next_actions.action: TIER BOUNDARY: T2 complete (106/106). Run expanded validation across all tiers. Priority tests to verify: #160-#167 and #169 (full forge pipeline tests — these were marked via code review, need live forge run verification). Also verify #149 (Context Bar position), #109 (repo badge placeholder), #148 (PromptHistory table), #167 (Inspector strategy recs).
Add panel resize drag handles for Navigator and Inspector panels. Workbench store already has navigatorWidth/inspectorWidth state, but no drag handle UI exists to resize them.

Add localStorage/sessionStorage persistence: panel widths (workbench.navigatorWidth/inspectorWidth) in localStorage, active activity (workbench.activeActivity) in sessionStorage, and history sort/filter preferences (history.filters) in localStorage.

Add @ context injection popup: when user types '@' in PromptEdit textarea, show a fuzzy-search popup with context options. On selection, add a context chip to the existing ContextBar component. ContextBar already exists and has dismiss support.

Enhance DiffView.svelte with a toggle between side-by-side and inline modes, and a 'show differences only' toggle that hides identical sections. Currently DiffView shows a simple two-column original/modified layout with no toggling.

Add a 'Re-forge' button to PromptHistory expandable rows that calls the existing retryOptimization() API client function (already in client.ts, calls /api/optimize/{id}/retry). The button should trigger a new optimization run from an existing history entry.

Wire RepoPickerModal into a parent component (e.g., NavigatorGitHub or NavigatorFiles). The modal exists at frontend/src/lib/components/github/RepoPickerModal.svelte but is not imported by any component.

Verify integrator wiring: (1) Ctrl+B toggles Navigator, (2) Ctrl+I toggles Inspector, (3) Ctrl+N opens new tab, (4) Ctrl+W closes tab, (5) Ctrl+S saves (clears dirty), (6) > prefix scoping in CP, (7) strategy filter chips now correctly filter history. Test IDs that may now pass: #170-#173, #176, #202, #204, #211, #213, #215, #219.
